name: Chicken and Artichokes
recipeIngredient: 2 Jars artichoke hearts, drained and cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces and roll each piece in bread crumbs.
2. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the garlic cloves and sauté until golden brown. Remove from heat and discard the garlic cloves.
3. Add the seasoned chicken to the skillet and continue to sauté until lightly browned on both sides, about 6-8 minutes total.
4. Transfer the sautéed chicken and garlic to a large baking dish. Add salt, pepper, tarragon vinegar, and chopped parsley.
5. Scatter the artichoke hearts over the top of the chicken mixture.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and scatter the remaining artichoke halves on top. Return to oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through and the artichokes are heated through.
